event: capix.route
data: {"type":"capix.route","receiptId":"cpxr_sse_fixture","modelCapability":"auto","region":"routed","privacyClass":"authenticated-gateway"}

event: content.delta
data: {"type":"content.delta","content":"Capix "}

data: {"choices":[{"delta":{"content":"stream response fixture."}}]}

event: capix.usage
data: {"type":"capix.usage","inputUnits":3,"outputUnits":4}

event: capix.final
data: {"type":"capix.final","finishReason":"stop","receiptId":"cpxr_sse_fixture"}
